_covenant: OPEN-03: the exact ask copy, public (NFR-P5). Shown at most once a month, only after a completed dare or reading, never during a craving, the Quiet, or onboarding. Declining is one tap, suppresses 30 days, and costs nothing — the app is identical for payers and non-payers (INV-8).
lead: Inward is free, whole, for everyone — kept alive by the people it serves. If this month it served you, you can put a hand under it.
